views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's study stats, active subjects with progress bars, current streak, and a weekly hours mini-chart. A prominent quick-add FAB for logging sessions.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry sheet for logging a study session. Subject name with autocomplete from previous entries, category and session type pickers, duration stepper (5-min increments, default 30), focus slider (1-5 stars), optional progress update slider (0-100%), and a key takeaway text field.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological list of study sessions grouped by date with subject filter chips at the top. Each row shows subject, category icon, duration, focus rating dots, and session type badge. Swipe to delete.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: weekly study hours bar chart, category time breakdown donut chart, focus rating trend line, subject progress comparison bars, and AI-style insight cards about learning patterns.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayStudyMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total minutes studied today across all subjects

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todaySessionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of study sessions logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyStudyMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total minutes studied in the current calendar week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one study session logged, counting back from today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest consecutive study day streak

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageFocusRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean focus rating across all sessions in the last 30 days, rounded to 1 decimal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeSubjects
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unique subject names with their latest progressPercent, filtered to <100%, sorted by most recently studied

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyStudyData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (date, totalMinutes) for the last 7 days, used for the weekly bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total minutes per category in the last 30 days, sorted descending, for donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageSessionDuration
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean session duration in minutes across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekOverWeekChange
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in study minutes: (thisWeek - lastWeek) / lastWeek * 100

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topSubjectByTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Subject name with the most total study minutes in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: progressBySubject
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (subjectName, latestProgress, totalMinutesSpent) for all known subjects, sorted by progress descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: focusTrendData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 7-day rolling average of focus rating for trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: sessionTypeDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of sessions by type in the last 30 days for understanding learning style balance

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayStudyMinutes / dailyGoalMinutes as a 0.0-1.0 fraction for the progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of dynamically generated insight strings based on patterns: streak status, focus trends, category diversity, week-over-week change, most productive day of week

dailyGoal.description: Target study minutes per day. User-configurable via settings.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one study session of any duration was logged. Streaks break on any calendar day with zero sessions.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary: weekly total study hours compared to previous week (weekOverWeekChange). Secondary: 7-day rolling average of focus rating to detect focus improvement or burnout. Tertiary: category diversity score — number of distinct categories studied in the last 14 days divided by total categories.
insights: Week-over-week study time change with encouragement or gentle nudge
Focus pattern detection: if average focus drops below 3.0, suggest shorter sessions or breaks
Session type balance: if >80% of sessions are passive (lecture/reading), suggest adding practice or project work
Best study day identification: which day of the week has the highest average study time
Subject progress velocity: estimated completion date for active subjects based on recent progress rate
Category diversity encouragement: if only 1 category studied in 14 days, suggest exploring breadth
Duration optimization: correlation between session length and focus rating to find optimal session length
